description_long: This is a single-story residential house set within a fenced rectangular lot, featuring a modest front yard with a driveway and a detached garage. The house is surrounded by green lawns, shrubs, and several large leafy trees, providing shade and privacy. The structure itself has a flat roof and a simple, modern design with clean lines and minimal ornamentation. Windows are arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, with some larger panes facing the yard and smaller ones on the sides. The main entryway is visible from the front, marked by a small paved path leading to a recessed door, and there is no prominent porch or overhang. The backyard is enclosed by a wooden fence and includes additional green space and landscaping.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, surrounded by a fenced yard, trees, and a detached garage. The design is simple with asymmetrical windows and minimal exterior ornamentation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, driveway, detached garage, and prominent trees in the front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, lawn, and the house's flat roof with visible window placements.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, wooden fence, and the back side of the house with additional landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, side yard, and the house's clean lines and window arrangement.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main door accessed by a short paved path, no porch or overhang, minimal decorative elements
